install:
npm install --prefix backend
npm install --prefix frontend
python3 -m venv .venv
.venv/bin/pip install -e ".[dev]"

terminals.name: backend
terminals.description: Wait for Postgres, sync Drizzle schema (db:push), then run the Hono API on :3001
terminals.command: until pg_isready -h localhost -q; do sleep 0.5; done; DATABASE_URL="postgres://app:dev@localhost:5432/app" npm run db:push --prefix backend && PORT=3001 DATABASE_URL="postgres://app:dev@localhost:5432/app" FRONTEND_ORIGIN="http://localhost:3000" BETTER_AUTH_SECRET="2hkee/0PTQo7QHLQsAJ7F+WQxnP6qzXF+Tbk4daNRGo=" BETTER_AUTH_URL="http://localhost:3001" npm run dev --prefix backend
